title: 2025 Annual Report relative to "An Act Further Protecting Children"

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Trial Court Department of Research and Planning (pursuant to Section 5 of Chapter 205 of the Acts of 2008) submitting its fiscal year 2025 annual report relative to the prosecution and disposition of offenses established under "An Act Further Protecting Children"
